notes: Redo generated with built-in image generation after inspecting the cozy Toast Tortoise four-form sheet, the base Bulwark Siege Tank horror sprite, the v1 horror slice, and the cozy toast shard particle.
The source sheet contains six left-to-right subjects with clean gutters: four evolution stages, one static armor-shard particle, and one disabled wreck defeat still.
The attack particle prompt explicitly avoided speed lines, trails, directional smear, sparks shooting off, and motion blur so it reads as a still icon.

The transparent source alpha scan found six groups with 71-95px clear gutters between visible pixels, enough for clean slicing. Runtime forms use staged target sizes so the evolution progression remains clear in board and Codex views.
